title: UK finance chiefs are warming to AI, even as they keep spending in check
summary: An earlier edition of the survey found 96% of CFOs expect UK companies to raise technology investment over the next five years, and 77% expect that spending to lift productivity and growth, yet few anticipate much of a gain within the next…
